what_changed: Tightened V1 release evidence so successful measurements must have positive prompt and completion token counts.
Required release report rows to include at least one successful request plus positive prompt-token, completion-token, and output-throughput summaries.
Updated release-bundle fixtures and README release-evidence documentation for the stricter token-volume gate.
pr-evidence/release-evidence-token-volum.why: The V1 package goal requires real quality and latency evidence against no-cache prefill; zero-token or summary-only benchmark stubs should not pass release readiness.
